definitions.name: discharged_home
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where Discharge disposition (1=Home, 2=Transfer, 20=Expired) is Home

definitions.name: transferred
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where Discharge disposition (1=Home, 2=Transfer, 20=Expired) is Transfer to another facility

definitions.name: expired
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where Discharge disposition (1=Home, 2=Transfer, 20=Expired) is Expired (deceased)
